test.name: replication for RT UUID document IDs

queries.sphinxql: JOIN CLUSTER test AT '%addr_connect%'; SELECT id, tag, price FROM test:uuid_rt ORDER BY id ASC;
debug wait test status 4 like 'state' option 'timeout'=30; SELECT id, tag, price FROM test:uuid_rt ORDER BY id ASC;
debug wait test status 6 like 'state' option 'timeout'=30; SELECT id, tag, price FROM test:uuid_rt ORDER BY id ASC;
